reasons.label: Distance too far
reasons.description: Job is 11+ miles from my home (or beyond my max travel radius)
reasons.rule: Job distance >= (cleaner max_travel_miles + 1). Default max_travel = 10 miles.

reasons.label: Time conflict
reasons.rule: Job scheduled start is outside cleaner's availability windows.

reasons.label: Job type not offered
reasons.description: I don't offer this service (move-out, pets, etc.)
reasons.rule: Job requires service cleaner has explicitly opted out of (move-in/out, pets, stairs, heavy lifting).

reasons.label: Safety concern
reasons.description: Address flagged, threatening client, or unsafe conditions at/near property
reasons.rule: Platform-flagged address OR harassing/threatening client messages OR cleaner reports unsafe conditions. Optional: upload 1 photo. If no photo: short note (min 20 chars) required.

config.photo_prompt: If you can, please upload 1 photo of the unsafe condition. This is optional, but it helps us keep the platform safe.

reasons.label: Access / logistics mismatch
reasons.description: Building access or parking conflicts with my constraints
reasons.rule: Building access instructions conflict with cleaner's marked constraints.

reasons.label: Too short notice
reasons.description: Job start is less than 18 hours away from when the request was sent
reasons.rule: Time from request sent to job scheduled start < 18 hours.
